name: lq
description: LegalQuants community access in Claude Code — search and synthesize the community's collective knowledge (chat archive + curated knowledge vault) through one connector, with /lq:start for a personalized orientation, /lq:ask for cross-source answers, /lq:assess to take on the community's open questions, and /lq:update to draft your Living Profile from your own community footprint. Members sign in with their LegalQuants account.
